compiled_state.title: record-test-status.sh discovers __pycache__/*.pyc files as test files causing false test failures
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When tests/scripts/__pycache__/ contains .pyc files, record-test-status.sh discovers them as test files and attempts to run them, producing false failures. The .pyc files are pytest compilation artifacts. Fix: record-test-status.sh should exclude __pycache__ directories from test file discovery.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). severity=1 (false test failures), complexity=0 (single script), environment=0 (local), intermittent=0 (deterministic when pycache exists).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned (high confidence). __pycache__ exclusion missing from both find commands — standard artifact exclusion pattern already applied for node_modules, .venv, etc.
comments.author: Test
